    echo "SCC layer is $FULL% full.";     rm -rf "${INSTALL_PATH_TOMCAT}";     if [ -d "/opt/java/.scc" ]; then           chmod -R 0777 /opt/java/.scc;     fi;         echo "SCC generation phase completed";
```
